texto: NocturneWhere are you now,my poems,my sleepwalkers?No mumbles tonight?Where are you, thirst,fever, humming tedium?The sodium streetlightsburr outside my window,steadfast, unreachable,little astonishmentslighting the way uphill.Where are you now,when I need you most? It’s late. I’m old. Come soon, you feral cats among the dahlias.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de W. S. Di Piero que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “NocturneWhere are you now,my poems,my sleepwalkers?No mumbles tonight?Where are you, thirst,fever…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, loneliness, nocturnal, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
